market_brief.summary_en: CONSTRUCTIVE regime at 67/100 with SPY at $741.75 and QQQ at $721.34 posting modest gains while distribution days signal caution.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSM closed at $423.93 with price above all EMAs including EMA21 at $417.36 and golden cross intact near 52-week high. A+ setup quality supported by Stage2 6/7 and RS 78.1 in confirmed uptrend. AI demand remains robust with tight 3nm/2nm capacity and strong long-term conviction on TSMC as AI infrastructure play.

symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: Near-term pullback risk to EMA21 $417.36 or 52-week high $449.08 rejection
